title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

title: Our commitment to community safety
summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
summary: The Google Translate logo sits in the middle of colorful illustrated scenes, including people translating live conversations and a birthday cake topped by candles with the numeral 20

title: Migrating a text agent to a voice assistant with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic
summary: In this post, we explore what it takes to migrate a traditional text agent into a conversational voice assistant using Amazon Nova 2 Sonic. We compare text and voice agent requirements, highlight design priorities for different use cases, break down agent architecture, and address common concerns like tools and sub-agents for reuse and system prompt adaptation. This post helps you navigate the migration process and avoid common pitfalls.

title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni model now available on Amazon SageMaker JumpStart
summary: Today, we are excited to announce the day zero availability of NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni on Amazon SageMaker JumpStart. In this post, we walk through the model architecture and key capabilities of Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, explore the enterprise use cases it unlocks, and show you how to deploy and run inference using Amazon SageMaker JumpStart.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: AI Security: Deploying Enterprise AI Securely
summary: Learn what enterprise AI security means, why it matters, what secure deployment requires, and the vulnerabilities enterprises should understand.

title: Reaching SOTA Without Breaking the Bank: Using AI21 Maestro to optimize deep research agents
Together AI Brings NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni to Developers on Day 0
summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is now on Together AI: a single open model that reasons across video, images, audio, and text, built for agentic workloads at scale.

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: GLM-5-Turbo launched
summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5-Turbo as a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon task execution. It is positioned as part of the company's new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 announced as a flagship base model for agent engineering
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5 as its new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also states that GLM-5 achieved top-tier results on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, comparable to Claude Opus 4.5.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model released
summary: Zhipu AI presented GLM-4.6V as a 100B-class open-source visual reasoning model with standout performance. It is described as achieving same-scale SOTA visual understanding, supporting native tool use and 128K context.

title: AutoGLM agent model introduced
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses core challenges in task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while enabling continual self-improvement.

title: AutoClaw launched
summary: Zhipu AI promoted AutoClaw as a product that can be installed on any computer in one minute. It is presented as a native product in the company's AI lineup.

title: GLM-OS concept unveiled with AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. The announcement framed the launch as part of the company's push to expand the large-model agent ecosystem.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support broader agent ecosystem development. The model, CogAgent-9B-20241220, is described as being trained from GLM-4V-9B for specialized agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay showcased new AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At its Agent OpenDay, Zhipu AI announced that AutoGLM can autonomously execute more than 50-step workflows and operate across apps, while also enabling fully automated web browsing on supported sites. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing as a computer-operating agent product.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and better usability. The release is presented as a new model update in the company's blog.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced its Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The announcement positions it as a new speech model release.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment news item rather than a product launch.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates availability of a preview model for evaluation or public comparison.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks a major model release in the company's lineup.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, describing it as offering deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The post presents it as a new model announcement.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement identifies it as a new model release from the company.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The item is a model release centered on reasoning capabilities.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, describing 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone in the company's enterprise AI strategy.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent positioned as entering the era of business value delivery. The announcement frames the product as a practical enterprise AI offering focused on measurable business outcomes.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and identified it as open-source. This is a named model announcement emphasizing performance and open availability.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification signals external validation for the company's enterprise AI infrastructure product.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI reported that Kazakhstan President Tokayev met with Kai-Fu Lee, the company's CEO. This is a notable corporate and government engagement highlighting the company's international visibility.
